headline: Charles River Stock Moves North Since Q4 Earnings and Revenue Beat
summary: CRAI's shares rise 3.1% after Q4 earnings and revenues top estimates. The company records double-digit sales growth and expects 2026 revenues of $785-$805M.

raw.headline: Charles River Stock Moves North Since Q4 Earnings and Revenue Beat

headline: 1 Cash-Producing Stock with Impressive Fundamentals and 2 We Turn Down
summary: Generating cash is essential for any business, but not all cash-rich companies are great investments. Some produce plenty of cash but fail to allocate it effectively, leading to missed opportunities.
